source.notes: All 6 dev Gelson's Westlake Village receipts. Department headers (GROCERY/PRODUCE/REG DELI/BAKERY) measured bold (header ink density med 0.193 vs body 0.114, ~1.7x) and underlined 13/13 (dot-matrix dashed rule just below the baseline; stylescan's box-interior detector misses it -- measured with a below-box band detector). Cap height equals body. Payment/summary/footer measured body-normal, so only section_header is styled.

section_header.notes: 13/13 department headers underlined + bold across the fleet.
